news.t: WisdomTree Launches U.S. MidCap Quality Growth (QMID) and U.S. SmallCap Quality Growth (QSML) Funds

holdings.infoBox: QMID is an equity ETF with a total of 124 individual holdings. The top holdings are Deckers Outdoor stock at 1.38%, Tenet Healthcare at 1.35%, Somnigroup International at 1.34%, Ralph Lauren at 1.33%, and DigitalOcean Holdings at 1.31%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree U.S. MidCap Quality Growth Fund (QMID) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in mid cap equity. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of US mid-cap growth companies that exhibit the strongest quality characteristics relative to their peers. QMID was launched on Jan 25, 2024 and is issued by WisdomTree.
infoTable: WisdomTree U.S. MidCap Quality Growth Index

data.title: WisdomTree Launches U.S. MidCap Quality Growth (QMID) and U.S. SmallCap Quality Growth (QSML) Funds
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--WisdomTree, Inc. (NYSE: WT), a global financial innovator, announced today the launch of the U.S. MidCap Quality Growth Fund (QMID) and U.S. SmallCap Quality Growth Fund (QS...
